AboutPage.title: About
AboutPage.description: ClawEmploy provides pre-configured AI agents for indie developers and solopreneurs.
AboutPage.introduction: ClawEmploy is an AI agent platform built for indie developers and solopreneurs. We provide pre-configured expert AI agents that automate your daily work — from market research and SEO to testing and project management. Built on the open-source OpenClaw framework.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pricing
pricing.description: Choose the plan that works best for you

item-1.question: What is ClawEmploy?
item-1.answer: ClawEmploy provides pre-configured AI agents that handle specialized tasks like market research, SEO optimization, automated testing, and content creation. Think of it as hiring expert freelancers — but they are AI-powered, available 24/7, and cost a fraction of the price.

item-2.question: How does it differ from hiring a freelancer?
item-2.answer: Unlike freelancers, our AI agents work around the clock, deliver consistent quality, and can be deployed in minutes. No interviews, no onboarding, no missed deadlines. Plus, you only pay for what you use.

item-3.question: What platforms do agents work on?
item-3.answer: Our agents integrate with Telegram, Discord, Slack, GitHub, and more. They can monitor channels, respond to messages, create pull requests, and automate workflows across all your existing tools.

item-4.question: How much does it cost?
item-4.answer: We use a pay-per-use model. You only pay for the tasks your agents complete. No monthly subscriptions required, though we offer volume discounts for teams. Join our waitlist for early access pricing.

item-5.question: Is my data secure?
item-5.answer: Absolutely. We use enterprise-grade encryption, and your data is never used to train models. Each agent runs in an isolated environment. We are also built on the open-source OpenClaw framework, so you can audit the code yourself.

agents.title: Our AI Agents

item-1.title: Research Agent
item-1.description: Market research, competitor analysis, and trend tracking. Get comprehensive reports delivered to your inbox or chat.

item-2.title: SEO Agent
item-2.description: Keyword research, content optimization, and link building. Boost your search rankings on autopilot.

item-3.title: Testing Agent
item-3.description: Automated testing, bug tracking, and quality reports. Ship with confidence every time.

item-4.title: DevOps Agent
item-4.description: CI/CD monitoring, deployment automation, and infrastructure alerts. Keep your systems running smoothly.

item-5.title: Content Agent
item-5.description: Blog writing, social media content, and newsletter creation. Maintain a consistent content pipeline.

item-6.title: PM Agent
item-6.description: Task assignment, progress tracking, and daily/weekly reports. Stay on top of your projects.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps
howItWorks.description: Get your AI agents up and running in minutes

step-1.title: Choose Your Agent
step-1.description: Browse our catalog of pre-configured AI experts. Each agent specializes in a specific domain.

step-2.title: Configure & Connect
step-2.description: Connect your platforms — Telegram, Discord, Slack, GitHub. Set preferences and rules.

step-3.title: Deploy & Scale
step-3.description: Your agent starts working immediately. Monitor performance and scale as needed.
